Video Guide: How to Point the DMARC, SPF, and DKIM Records to Valimail

Video Guide: How to Point the DMARC, SPF, and DKIM Records to Valimail
======================================================================

This is a guide that walks through the steps of pointing the DMARC, SPF, and DKIM records to Valimail

Updated over a year ago

This video guide is intended for Valimail Align users, and it contains instructions for pointing the DMARC, SPF, and DKIM records to Valimail.

To ensure your emails are properly authenticated and to avoid any potential deliverability issues, follow [this](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9266381-pre-configure-spf-and-dkim-records-in-valimail-align)
 guide to preconfigure your sending services in Valimail Align before pointing the SPF and DKIM records to Valimail.

The articles mentioned in the guide along with additional resources, are linked at the bottom of this page. If you have questions regarding the steps outlined in this guide, please feel free to contact us at [\[email protected\]](https://support.valimail.com/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#c1b2b4b1b1aeb3b581b7a0ada8aca0a8adefa2aeac)
.

# Connect your domain's DMARC record to Valimail Align | Valimail Help Center

[Skip to main content](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9493697-connect-your-domain-s-dmarc-record-to-valimail-align#main-content)

[All Collections](https://support.valimail.com/en/)

[Valimail Suite](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/3986010-valimail-suite)

[Align](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/9031139-align)

Connect your domain's DMARC record to Valimail Align

Connect your domain's DMARC record to Valimail Align
====================================================

Updated over a year ago

This article outlines the necessary steps for connecting your domain's DMARC record to Valimail Align. This approach streamlines the process of connecting Align with your DNS host, eliminating the need for manually publishing records in your external DNS zone.

### **Connect your DMARC record with the 9 easy steps below**

1.  #### Go to app.valimail.com and log into your Align account.
    
2.  #### Click on **DOMAINS**.
    
    [![DOMAINS](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088217686/f06c217dd9abea4c04508c97/image+%2874%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=ca8497f2192cd9c79c65d87b81d844aff55930f171f6ccb5a39494a3c47ed108&req=dSAvHst%2FmodXX%2FMW1HO4zbfvt%2Bolz4zYHApMfS129JuajfWRozH63xttvWZj%0AMbKU%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088217686/f06c217dd9abea4c04508c97/image+%2874%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=ca8497f2192cd9c79c65d87b81d844aff55930f171f6ccb5a39494a3c47ed108&req=dSAvHst%2FmodXX%2FMW1HO4zbfvt%2Bolz4zYHApMfS129JuajfWRozH63xttvWZj%0AMbKU%0A)
    
3.  #### Click on the Domain Name that you want to connect.
    
    [![domain name](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088221228/29f2df0bf278b591df3fc1aa/image+%2875%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=5f73b0d7902bd1b2d0dd0f38a2b8c438a399c87f259e801be6593c44ec3a91e3&req=dSAvHst8nINdUfMW1HO4zVq3cqKdpIpqKd86g9mx8tMtZK%2FFnodNi%2FWQG8CK%0A39sE%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088221228/29f2df0bf278b591df3fc1aa/image+%2875%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=5f73b0d7902bd1b2d0dd0f38a2b8c438a399c87f259e801be6593c44ec3a91e3&req=dSAvHst8nINdUfMW1HO4zVq3cqKdpIpqKd86g9mx8tMtZK%2FFnodNi%2FWQG8CK%0A39sE%0A)
    
4.  #### Click on the **DMARC Record** button.
    
    [![DMARC Record](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088223715/65e5ad11e487d5b741998294/image+%2876%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=28ce04f343b878e475057a6c0820bf7a77631b819a986bcf48f8084eb42c08c6&req=dSAvHst8noZeXPMW1HO4zbAaDq7env%2FLOR7db9Yg9C1tyYBXYh8JwCiqjn6o%0ABlrX%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088223715/65e5ad11e487d5b741998294/image+%2876%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=28ce04f343b878e475057a6c0820bf7a77631b819a986bcf48f8084eb42c08c6&req=dSAvHst8noZeXPMW1HO4zbAaDq7env%2FLOR7db9Yg9C1tyYBXYh8JwCiqjn6o%0ABlrX%0A)
    
5.  #### Click on the link under **Recommended: Connect Automatically**.
    
    [![Connect Automatically](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088226282/d0fd3b42c65b2f79a789b411/image+%2877%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=7cd3dd6383af795057151f9d4632037064d2863b268ae3590fa6dff86554c88d&req=dSAvHst8m4NXW%2FMW1HO4zX24m0wRTplMa9E5XemlFoudEeT3RiOPOpJl1mqY%0ASHz9%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088226282/d0fd3b42c65b2f79a789b411/image+%2877%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=7cd3dd6383af795057151f9d4632037064d2863b268ae3590fa6dff86554c88d&req=dSAvHst8m4NXW%2FMW1HO4zX24m0wRTplMa9E5XemlFoudEeT3RiOPOpJl1mqY%0ASHz9%0A)
    
6.  #### Click **Continue**.
    
    [![Continue](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088228477/1ec6784b807447401f886298/image+%2878%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=f34487368be1c52de7781518f51d1638eade883c9b6d353a184fa451ec45d12a&req=dSAvHst8lYVYXvMW1HO4ze7Dpp4Rx280p872T1nZGpBsMomBPzA4sBhCRtYU%0AZx8p%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088228477/1ec6784b807447401f886298/image+%2878%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=f34487368be1c52de7781518f51d1638eade883c9b6d353a184fa451ec45d12a&req=dSAvHst8lYVYXvMW1HO4ze7Dpp4Rx280p872T1nZGpBsMomBPzA4sBhCRtYU%0AZx8p%0A)
    
7.  #### Log into your DNS Host account.
    
    [![log in](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088236385/21d811012b7af876fa02f3ce/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=c1f187ebe3aff34c998802ebdac82b3a550f8796270d0ee691e9ae599bb79508&req=dSAvHst9m4JXXPMW1HO4zRRqEKmVES8KHYmOikrJWZPFEbxMLNZ9BZHZnwKK%0AYlZ%2F%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088236385/21d811012b7af876fa02f3ce/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=c1f187ebe3aff34c998802ebdac82b3a550f8796270d0ee691e9ae599bb79508&req=dSAvHst9m4JXXPMW1HO4zRRqEKmVES8KHYmOikrJWZPFEbxMLNZ9BZHZnwKK%0AYlZ%2F%0A)
    
8.  #### If we detect an existing DMARC record we will present the proposed changes. After reviewing them click on **Okay, Continue**.
    
    [![okay continue](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088233799/8e882e651d09c0aea111d922/image+%2879%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=a35eabd6f66bb3938aec7c70de6a8d0d5e8caae8808ca31bf7036510028ebf96&req=dSAvHst9noZWUPMW1HO4zaajOQ%2B7zYycJ%2BDGk7Y4dlkTR2Tx%2Flno%2B87XXP8c%0ABMEg%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088233799/8e882e651d09c0aea111d922/image+%2879%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=a35eabd6f66bb3938aec7c70de6a8d0d5e8caae8808ca31bf7036510028ebf96&req=dSAvHst9noZWUPMW1HO4zaajOQ%2B7zYycJ%2BDGk7Y4dlkTR2Tx%2Flno%2B87XXP8c%0ABMEg%0A)
    
9.  #### Click **Done**.
    
    [![done](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088239601/4ce9a56ac39d7c2d9be01462/image+%2880%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=ead3002fd96db2e7db4865ad8c8d378b06da76b080daf9de219124c7803d880f&req=dSAvHst9lIdfWPMW1HO4zRFEHe0tbElesNpbYVGnG4z0ljslaVqPYdEZ5pU6%0Ad6Sg%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088239601/4ce9a56ac39d7c2d9be01462/image+%2880%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=ead3002fd96db2e7db4865ad8c8d378b06da76b080daf9de219124c7803d880f&req=dSAvHst9lIdfWPMW1HO4zRFEHe0tbElesNpbYVGnG4z0ljslaVqPYdEZ5pU6%0Ad6Sg%0A)
    

### **Frequently Asked Questions**

#### Why am I not seeing the option to Connect Automatically?

The option to automatically connect is not available if your domain is hosted by a DNS provider that doesn't support this feature. You can still manually publish the DMARC record in your external DNS by following the instructions [here](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9142783-getting-started-with-valimail-align)
.

#### I don't have access to the external DNS, can I forward these instructions to my admin?

Yes, you can! In the instructions above at Step 7, you are given the option to forward the login to someone else. Share the link with your DNS admin, and he can continue the process with Steps 7-9.

[![share login](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088330853/7fb3102e7f5d4a510e4c9da9/image+%2881%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=4a7746cccba6e8891e298de06ee63e6a9df53af1adacffbffcaa5d4dd5f32780&req=dSAvHsp9nYlaWvMW1HO4zdCQJ2Pl5M0MPsYBH%2F%2Fnrj1NXxhrQBTRZdyFMweI%0AUoE6%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088330853/7fb3102e7f5d4a510e4c9da9/image+%2881%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=4a7746cccba6e8891e298de06ee63e6a9df53af1adacffbffcaa5d4dd5f32780&req=dSAvHsp9nYlaWvMW1HO4zdCQJ2Pl5M0MPsYBH%2F%2Fnrj1NXxhrQBTRZdyFMweI%0AUoE6%0A)

#### Should I connect using an NS record or a TXT record?

In the instructions above, at Step 5 you have the option to choose between a TXT record or an NS record. We suggest utilizing the NS record which would enable you to manage the DMARC record through Valimail, eliminating the need to manually edit the record in your DNS whenever a change is needed. With the TXT record, you will be able to send DMARC aggregate reports to Valimail, but any changes required on the record itself need to be performed in your DNS and not in Valimail.

[![TXT or NS](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088338168/5e6fd5dc61b0dee7f30444af/image+%2882%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=328289e58f3f0d8f47815f0cf9cae663dacd34d0d4e2a4494b8c08491aaba9ae&req=dSAvHsp9lYBZUfMW1HO4zVsKzjBpNY%2B%2FsbbyQKzSIYH1a38hcD%2Bj4g1j6lwo%0AjQpI%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088338168/5e6fd5dc61b0dee7f30444af/image+%2882%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=328289e58f3f0d8f47815f0cf9cae663dacd34d0d4e2a4494b8c08491aaba9ae&req=dSAvHsp9lYBZUfMW1HO4zVsKzjBpNY%2B%2FsbbyQKzSIYH1a38hcD%2Bj4g1j6lwo%0AjQpI%0A)

#### After following these steps the domain configuration page still shows the DMARC Record as not being configured. Should I be concerned?

This is expected when making changes in the external DNS. It may take anywhere from a few minutes to maybe an hour for the change to propagate.

# Self-Onboarding Guide for Align | Valimail Help Center

[Skip to main content](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9566916-self-onboarding-guide-for-align#main-content)

Table of contents

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9566916-self-onboarding-guide-for-align#h_88dd23b05a)

[All Collections](https://support.valimail.com/en/)

[Valimail Suite](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/3986010-valimail-suite)

[Align](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/9031139-align)

Self-Onboarding Guide for Align

Self-Onboarding Guide for Align
===============================

A step-by-step guide for onboarding your domains in Align

Updated over a year ago

Table of contents

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9566916-self-onboarding-guide-for-align#h_88dd23b05a)

Welcome to Align! This guide will provide step-by-step instructions for setting up the DMARC reporting, preconfiguring senders in Align, and pointing the SPF and DKIM records to Valimail. After following these instructions, you can take advantage of the email authentication infrastructure and reporting capabilities that Align comes with.

We strongly recommend following the steps in the order shown below, to ensure that DMARC reporting is properly set up, and to avoid any issues with email authentication.

**Onboarding Steps**
--------------------

### **1\. Point the DMARC record to Valimail**

By pointing your DMARC record to Valimail, you will gain visibility into who is sending emails on behalf of your domain. To point DMARC to us, follow one of these two guides:

*   [Manually point the DMARC record to Valimail](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9142783-getting-started-with-valimail-align)
    
*   [Automate your DNS connection](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9493697-connect-your-domain-s-dmarc-record-to-valimail-align)
     (certain DNS Hosts might not support this method)
    

### **2\. Preconfigure the SPF and DKIM records for your sending services**

This step is important for ensuring email authentication when you point the SPF and DKIM records to Valimail. Follow the video guide [here](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9266381-video-guide-pre-configure-spf-and-dkim-records-in-valimail-align)
 to preconfigure the SPF and DKIM records for your sending services.

### **3\. Point the SPF and DKIM records to Valimail**

Pointing the SPF and DKIM records to Valimail will allow you to use our email authentication infrastructure, and gain access to features like the instant SPF technology and a platform to easily manage all of your DKIM records in one place. Point the records to Valimail by following the instructions from one of these two guides:

*   [Manually point the SPF and DKIM records to Valimail](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9336435-video-guide-how-to-point-the-dmarc-spf-and-dkim-records-to-valimail)
    
*   [Automate your DNS connection](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9504819-connect-your-domain-s-spf-and-dkim-records-to-valimail-align)
     (certain DNS Hosts might not support this method)
    

### **4\. Use the Authentication Report to monitor the traffic on your domain**

Monitor the DMARC, SPF, and DKIM pass rates for individual sending services, to identify possible issues with email authentication. Use the guide [here](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9318651-how-to-use-the-valimail-align-authentication-report)
 to learn how to use the Authentication Report.

If you have any questions about Align or need help with the steps above, please don't hesitate to reach out to Valimail Product Support at [\[email protected\]](https://support.valimail.com/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#186b6d6868776a6c586e79747175797174367b7775)
. We are always happy to assist you in any way we can.

* * *

[Connect your domain's SPF and DKIM records to Valimail Align](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9504819-connect-your-domain-s-spf-and-dkim-records-to-valimail-align)

Valimail Align: How to update your payment information

Valimail Align: How to update your payment information
======================================================

Updated over 11 months ago

Table of contents

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9274978-valimail-align-how-to-update-your-payment-information#h_352db845a2)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9274978-valimail-align-how-to-update-your-payment-information#h_352db845a2)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9274978-valimail-align-how-to-update-your-payment-information#h_aba310e56a)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9274978-valimail-align-how-to-update-your-payment-information#h_2d0d6c308b)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9274978-valimail-align-how-to-update-your-payment-information#h_89a68676d4)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9274978-valimail-align-how-to-update-your-payment-information#h_8845098c81)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9274978-valimail-align-how-to-update-your-payment-information#h_cc51cbe89d)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9274978-valimail-align-how-to-update-your-payment-information#h_83f55c217d)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9274978-valimail-align-how-to-update-your-payment-information#h_252f275a8e)

We're excited to introduce new features to help you take control of your Align subscription! You can now easily manage your payment method, update your billing address, and even cancel your subscription directly through your account. In this article, we'll guide you through each of these processes, ensuring you have all the information you need to manage your subscription effortlessly.

**TABLE OF CONTENTS**

**[Access the Manage Subscription Page](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9274978-valimail-align-how-to-update-your-payment-information#h_352db845a2)
**

**[Edit an existing payment method](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9274978-valimail-align-how-to-update-your-payment-information#h_aba310e56a)
**

**[Add another payment method](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9274978-valimail-align-how-to-update-your-payment-information#h_2d0d6c308b)
**

**[Delete a payment method or make another one default](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9274978-valimail-align-how-to-update-your-payment-information#h_89a68676d4)
**

**[Update billing address](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9274978-valimail-align-how-to-update-your-payment-information#h_8845098c81)
**

**[Download an invoice](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9274978-valimail-align-how-to-update-your-payment-information#h_cc51cbe89d)
**

**[Cancel your Align subscription](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9274978-valimail-align-how-to-update-your-payment-information#h_83f55c217d)
**

**[Renew a canceled subscription](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9274978-valimail-align-how-to-update-your-payment-information#h_252f275a8e)
**

**Access the Manage Subscription Page**
---------------------------------------

To open the manage subscription page, follow these steps:

1.  Go to app.valimail.com and log into your Valimail Align account.
    
2.  Click on the **Account Settings** icon on the top right corner of the page.
    
    [![account settings](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1166531721/beafaf0565f3fe3a014710b4/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=8ea42f8537d7b67837b0d375f1e3470b03f6136111fa64641c407cd8714da6df&req=dSEhEMx9nIZdWPMW1HO4zcG7yIZXZOWJjDYcBEOoCT%2FhsT2V5Ahse6QWDydC%0AD2Jf%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1166531721/beafaf0565f3fe3a014710b4/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=8ea42f8537d7b67837b0d375f1e3470b03f6136111fa64641c407cd8714da6df&req=dSEhEMx9nIZdWPMW1HO4zcG7yIZXZOWJjDYcBEOoCT%2FhsT2V5Ahse6QWDydC%0AD2Jf%0A)
    
3.  Click on the **Manage Subscription** link.
    
    [![manage subscription](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1166540160/44cd3a3a11d41feb0f40d019/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=06d45d7ee042873d96ce578922bb1079af01f0f874335605b3912d0e4c6eaf82&req=dSEhEMx6nYBZWfMW1HO4zaOjTHXqC0rBXIVyADs9cpYRkfejISOixrRUhHY7%0AGZQs%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1166540160/44cd3a3a11d41feb0f40d019/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=06d45d7ee042873d96ce578922bb1079af01f0f874335605b3912d0e4c6eaf82&req=dSEhEMx6nYBZWfMW1HO4zaOjTHXqC0rBXIVyADs9cpYRkfejISOixrRUhHY7%0AGZQs%0A)
    
4.  To request a secure login from Stripe, type the Account Owner's email address and click **Send**.
    
    [![type the email address](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1166541691/7aaecc1c62d0cb88e539181d/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=199a008614b3c33d057a4a5bb164ef9e3d68b0a7291010739a7219b88c1ccf74&req=dSEhEMx6nIdWWPMW1HO4ze4TDUBPEiJ4RIbmI6I4ZiSg9Agfr1CZ%2FWVtfAJy%0AjGq9%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1166541691/7aaecc1c62d0cb88e539181d/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=199a008614b3c33d057a4a5bb164ef9e3d68b0a7291010739a7219b88c1ccf74&req=dSEhEMx6nIdWWPMW1HO4ze4TDUBPEiJ4RIbmI6I4ZiSg9Agfr1CZ%2FWVtfAJy%0AjGq9%0A)
    
5.  Go to your Inbox, open the email you received from Valimail, and click on the link to log in to your customer portal.
    
    [![log in to your customer portal](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169051543/f9ca675174c7647a9c5713c2/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=9668fd3ecb66038b3010287a5ed17fbcbf523994264eec582475f7a3f674263b&req=dSEhH8l7nIRbWvMW1HO4zVe8CRXKMKtZpGyh3Xg35LeJ0iVweynzBp1yp1My%0ACHIJ%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169051543/f9ca675174c7647a9c5713c2/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=9668fd3ecb66038b3010287a5ed17fbcbf523994264eec582475f7a3f674263b&req=dSEhH8l7nIRbWvMW1HO4zVe8CRXKMKtZpGyh3Xg35LeJ0iVweynzBp1yp1My%0ACHIJ%0A)
    

**Edit an existing payment method**
-----------------------------------

1.  Under the **Current Plan** section, click on the pencil button next to the default payment method.
    
    [![current plan](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169082693/8c32ed0bbe617d3f30ed7b16/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=3b2a9d5a533f7d67cc3c02d1093787377f3eeaeb1ff092c1c6e56d83661493ab&req=dSEhH8l2n4dWWvMW1HO4zYzeT2fSXpWkOGEpAkva3gDTdhIhYSlqifE1QySd%0A9rx9%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169082693/8c32ed0bbe617d3f30ed7b16/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=3b2a9d5a533f7d67cc3c02d1093787377f3eeaeb1ff092c1c6e56d83661493ab&req=dSEhH8l2n4dWWvMW1HO4zYzeT2fSXpWkOGEpAkva3gDTdhIhYSlqifE1QySd%0A9rx9%0A)
    
2.  Complete the form with the updated payment method, then click **Update** at the bottom of the page.
    

**Add another payment method**
------------------------------

1.  Under the **Payment Methods** section, click on **Add payment method**.
    
    [![add payment method](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169060796/693595c45d0ef8edf52db3a0/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=38b47961ae4eef9f537fc7fe19f0894f0a878933a6bc034d28bd365b1d7470fa&req=dSEhH8l4nYZWX%2FMW1HO4zeXAegmfMxnnZBoQZ0gX9CGTEnqZF121qFkypkha%0AthaC%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169060796/693595c45d0ef8edf52db3a0/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=38b47961ae4eef9f537fc7fe19f0894f0a878933a6bc034d28bd365b1d7470fa&req=dSEhH8l4nYZWX%2FMW1HO4zeXAegmfMxnnZBoQZ0gX9CGTEnqZF121qFkypkha%0AthaC%0A)
    
2.  Complete the form with the **Card number**, **Expiration date**, **Security code**, **Country** and the **Zip code**.
    
    [![payment information](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169063404/e9cc5ad28e93e167f1fa1c28/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=abc56966a4a27d2e52097ad51f08c6fad03cd2160375e8cbe347be3cccfb648c&req=dSEhH8l4noVfXfMW1HO4zXAhHZxXGHnFl2lAIzzafNdyLgGwnJtLiDVrWET%2B%0A2BCU%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169063404/e9cc5ad28e93e167f1fa1c28/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=abc56966a4a27d2e52097ad51f08c6fad03cd2160375e8cbe347be3cccfb648c&req=dSEhH8l4noVfXfMW1HO4zXAhHZxXGHnFl2lAIzzafNdyLgGwnJtLiDVrWET%2B%0A2BCU%0A)
    
3.  Click **Update** on the bottom of the page.
    
    [![update button](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169065132/2226445d4f893990e64cf6b8/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=5034852209edc757bdbc137aad9d3c7fc4d62c2601b35cc261227c4fc2d8c54e&req=dSEhH8l4mIBcW%2FMW1HO4zVtjyXA5aXMOufRtgp3%2BJ52Wvrn4voXKA8KMBdGa%0AEfzl%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169065132/2226445d4f893990e64cf6b8/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=5034852209edc757bdbc137aad9d3c7fc4d62c2601b35cc261227c4fc2d8c54e&req=dSEhH8l4mIBcW%2FMW1HO4zVtjyXA5aXMOufRtgp3%2BJ52Wvrn4voXKA8KMBdGa%0AEfzl%0A)
    

**Delete a payment method or make another one default**
-------------------------------------------------------

1.  Go to the **Payment Methods** section.
    
2.  Click on the button with the 3 dots next to the payment method that you want to delete or make default.
    
3.  Select **Make Default** or **Delete** depending on which action you want to complete.
    
    [![make default or delete](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169071122/2f75ea32ecf7dcd87b2ae4c5/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=14ff0e79c1616487fc27150f8565d30fa1ac3a50364664ec5125fd958afd1301&req=dSEhH8l5nIBdW%2FMW1HO4zTRKp7hL0BlgZGIE5mF0tVsxn1zebA3x8NPwqT0i%0AGCC4%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169071122/2f75ea32ecf7dcd87b2ae4c5/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=14ff0e79c1616487fc27150f8565d30fa1ac3a50364664ec5125fd958afd1301&req=dSEhH8l5nIBdW%2FMW1HO4zTRKp7hL0BlgZGIE5mF0tVsxn1zebA3x8NPwqT0i%0AGCC4%0A)
    

**Update billing address**
--------------------------

1.  Scroll down to the **Billing and Shipping Information** section.
    
2.  Click on **Update** information.
    
    [![update information](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169091252/5fb9bdc696f7e4c0b4944553/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=784531389117d091cf7924fb3dddbb99a1235f0f7e4d6afaca1975bb72810a8a&req=dSEhH8l3nINaW%2FMW1HO4zSCjm1PzDVAWntZz6u9b3NWF08FZO4rVZLDfRmVJ%0AxMzB%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169091252/5fb9bdc696f7e4c0b4944553/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=784531389117d091cf7924fb3dddbb99a1235f0f7e4d6afaca1975bb72810a8a&req=dSEhH8l3nINaW%2FMW1HO4zSCjm1PzDVAWntZz6u9b3NWF08FZO4rVZLDfRmVJ%0AxMzB%0A)
    
3.  Complete the form with the Billing information.
    
    [![billing information](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169092260/3acbdabbf22a7a7e9880f268/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=d462abd942ca5b7ca124eca84f8766d1a2e1dd4b032bc4180d929fbf9c025097&req=dSEhH8l3n4NZWfMW1HO4zduWHiLNYgv8r30uK9DthMz53vJQbdtfDvn8JADT%0Aq3G%2F%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169092260/3acbdabbf22a7a7e9880f268/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=d462abd942ca5b7ca124eca84f8766d1a2e1dd4b032bc4180d929fbf9c025097&req=dSEhH8l3n4NZWfMW1HO4zduWHiLNYgv8r30uK9DthMz53vJQbdtfDvn8JADT%0Aq3G%2F%0A)
    
4.  Click **Save** at the bottom of the page.
    

**Download an invoice**
-----------------------

1.  Go to the **Invoice History** section.
    
2.  Click on the invoice that you want to download.
    
    [![invoice history](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169103651/654ce17d2d59f56d69a7887a/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=5660519afe50f758ebb294ee405c2c43e1923db528f1b3205837bfcbd4533222&req=dSEhH8h%2BnodaWPMW1HO4zctsZIM9zTxp1Eos2VE8cD1PXNeqB60xpkuWhl72%0ABh%2Fz%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169103651/654ce17d2d59f56d69a7887a/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=5660519afe50f758ebb294ee405c2c43e1923db528f1b3205837bfcbd4533222&req=dSEhH8h%2BnodaWPMW1HO4zctsZIM9zTxp1Eos2VE8cD1PXNeqB60xpkuWhl72%0ABh%2Fz%0A)
    
3.  Click **Download invoice** or **Download receipt**.
    
    [![download invoice](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169105622/4295d3134ea31341f7979f4f/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=ff87449022ea13b92c85fd53fad8ad5b811396182fd42bf1987dfcb95fdb981d&req=dSEhH8h%2BmIddW%2FMW1HO4zbAguHqv7qAq%2FDtFE7avmoADGzqs2xFHR%2BmgyCi4%0AaZNZ%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169105622/4295d3134ea31341f7979f4f/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=ff87449022ea13b92c85fd53fad8ad5b811396182fd42bf1987dfcb95fdb981d&req=dSEhH8h%2BmIddW%2FMW1HO4zbAguHqv7qAq%2FDtFE7avmoADGzqs2xFHR%2BmgyCi4%0AaZNZ%0A)
    

**Cancel your Align subscription**
----------------------------------

1.  Under the Current Plan section, click on **Cancel plan**.
    
    [![cancel plan](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169112582/74429dc4785b415e876456a6/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=eafe19c482370ae2ee223de7f952b1d7148b9bd914dc02e8422bba94363f285b&req=dSEhH8h%2Fn4RXW%2FMW1HO4zSWTaZXiuIsxE7uysUThgWe1wRzc%2F4M0pcqPzjKr%0ALG7H%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169112582/74429dc4785b415e876456a6/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=eafe19c482370ae2ee223de7f952b1d7148b9bd914dc02e8422bba94363f285b&req=dSEhH8h%2Fn4RXW%2FMW1HO4zSWTaZXiuIsxE7uysUThgWe1wRzc%2F4M0pcqPzjKr%0ALG7H%0A)
    
2.  Click **Cancel plan** at the bottom of the page.
    
    [![cancel plan](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169111433/ff06b808a8ed9faf4e118e49/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=cec683f45b2c0663856fe30fc01b7bb8120ee897ce2dc59c0144e9119393ad4d&req=dSEhH8h%2FnIVcWvMW1HO4zfjTA1F%2FNhmU6rzMSIesaig%2FMXWicY15CjX8TJ6b%0AZlWm%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169111433/ff06b808a8ed9faf4e118e49/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=cec683f45b2c0663856fe30fc01b7bb8120ee897ce2dc59c0144e9119393ad4d&req=dSEhH8h%2FnIVcWvMW1HO4zfjTA1F%2FNhmU6rzMSIesaig%2FMXWicY15CjX8TJ6b%0AZlWm%0A)
    
3.  **OPTIONAL** - Tell us why you want to cancel.
    
    [![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169117620/fe8cf5aa420dd88998e9e286/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=f99becdc1b0692faab12087c2739d4f56c8ac10245400ee306034ea6c3bfff86&req=dSEhH8h%2FmoddWfMW1HO4zcEYtjlucMt510yrcSgxSReR7%2B4HtSiEVJeDjLlq%0AugGV%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169117620/fe8cf5aa420dd88998e9e286/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=f99becdc1b0692faab12087c2739d4f56c8ac10245400ee306034ea6c3bfff86&req=dSEhH8h%2FmoddWfMW1HO4zcEYtjlucMt510yrcSgxSReR7%2B4HtSiEVJeDjLlq%0AugGV%0A)
    

**Renew a canceled subscription**
---------------------------------

If you have a canceled subscription, you can renew it by following these steps:

1.  Under the current plan section, click on Renew plan.
    
    [![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169122535/5a771bdc4140b5141207b98f/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=f4d9f2159fa63c13d5cb24166e53397cf6f742c9ad50c5cf81ed0b8b9125d123&req=dSEhH8h8n4RcXPMW1HO4zdxUUaFb3cqriXb%2BI22KMJ72LRDrlTxy%2BxVvGuOt%0A4TL7%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169122535/5a771bdc4140b5141207b98f/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=f4d9f2159fa63c13d5cb24166e53397cf6f742c9ad50c5cf81ed0b8b9125d123&req=dSEhH8h8n4RcXPMW1HO4zdxUUaFb3cqriXb%2BI22KMJ72LRDrlTxy%2BxVvGuOt%0A4TL7%0A)
    
2.  On the next page, click on Renew plan.
    
    [![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169124328/30fcf2cc1a16e41144846b83/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=d591ed6cc9b3ee5df1b39878b35fea3449fdda938161e7e99306dd76af3bede6&req=dSEhH8h8mYJdUfMW1HO4zUiIx7r27Sd856uw%2FJE9CWKnd5w%2B3MfDyvreIMi1%0Af1MN%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1169124328/30fcf2cc1a16e41144846b83/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=d591ed6cc9b3ee5df1b39878b35fea3449fdda938161e7e99306dd76af3bede6&req=dSEhH8h8mYJdUfMW1HO4zUiIx7r27Sd856uw%2FJE9CWKnd5w%2B3MfDyvreIMi1%0Af1MN%0A)
    

As always, if you have any questions, please don't hesitate to **[submit a ticket](https://support.valimail.com/support/tickets/new)
**.

# Connect your domain's SPF and DKIM records to Valimail Align | Valimail Help Center

[Skip to main content](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9504819-connect-your-domain-s-spf-and-dkim-records-to-valimail-align#main-content)

Table of contents

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9504819-connect-your-domain-s-spf-and-dkim-records-to-valimail-align#h_9724f8c632)

[All Collections](https://support.valimail.com/en/)

[Valimail Suite](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/3986010-valimail-suite)

[Align](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/9031139-align)

Connect your domain's SPF and DKIM records to Valimail Align

Connect your domain's SPF and DKIM records to Valimail Align
============================================================

Updated over a year ago

Table of contents

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9504819-connect-your-domain-s-spf-and-dkim-records-to-valimail-align#h_9724f8c632)

This article outlines the necessary steps for connecting your domain's SPF and DKIM records to Valimail Align. This approach streamlines the process of connecting Align with your DNS host, eliminating the need for manually publishing records in your external DNS zone.

To ensure your emails are properly authenticated and to avoid any potential deliverability issues, follow [this](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9266381-pre-configure-spf-and-dkim-records-in-valimail-align)
 guide to preconfigure your sending services in Valimail Align before pointing the SPF and DKIM records to Valimail.

Point the SPF record to Valimail Align
--------------------------------------

1.  Go to app.valimail.com and log into your Align account.
    
2.  Click on **DOMAINS**.
    
    [![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088217686/f06c217dd9abea4c04508c97/image+%2874%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=ca8497f2192cd9c79c65d87b81d844aff55930f171f6ccb5a39494a3c47ed108&req=dSAvHst%2FmodXX%2FMW1HO4zbfvt%2Bolz4zYHApMfS129JuajfWRozH63xttvWZj%0AMbKU%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088217686/f06c217dd9abea4c04508c97/image+%2874%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=ca8497f2192cd9c79c65d87b81d844aff55930f171f6ccb5a39494a3c47ed108&req=dSAvHst%2FmodXX%2FMW1HO4zbfvt%2Bolz4zYHApMfS129JuajfWRozH63xttvWZj%0AMbKU%0A)
    
3.  Click on the **Domain Name** that you want to connect.
    
    [![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088221228/29f2df0bf278b591df3fc1aa/image+%2875%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=5f73b0d7902bd1b2d0dd0f38a2b8c438a399c87f259e801be6593c44ec3a91e3&req=dSAvHst8nINdUfMW1HO4zVq3cqKdpIpqKd86g9mx8tMtZK%2FFnodNi%2FWQG8CK%0A39sE%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088221228/29f2df0bf278b591df3fc1aa/image+%2875%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=5f73b0d7902bd1b2d0dd0f38a2b8c438a399c87f259e801be6593c44ec3a91e3&req=dSAvHst8nINdUfMW1HO4zVq3cqKdpIpqKd86g9mx8tMtZK%2FFnodNi%2FWQG8CK%0A39sE%0A)
    
4.  Click on the **SPF Record** button.
    
    [![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088405496/ddfd848194462005928bd5dc/image+%2883%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=1fb5a7fe26729713760405a87d460b286513018a1b29b2b6c7d132d990e69809&req=dSAvHs1%2BmIVWX%2FMW1HO4zYz7gRJcFXdy2CP0BGI422x3JtN0kYU7mxfHoQXh%0AtNWQ%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088405496/ddfd848194462005928bd5dc/image+%2883%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=1fb5a7fe26729713760405a87d460b286513018a1b29b2b6c7d132d990e69809&req=dSAvHs1%2BmIVWX%2FMW1HO4zYz7gRJcFXdy2CP0BGI422x3JtN0kYU7mxfHoQXh%0AtNWQ%0A)
    
5.  Click on the link under **Recommended: Connect Automatically**.
    
    [![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088405936/dd681f07518d0534de5768c7/image+%2885%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=b76e8ec0e38e09bc7363950f2922b9126e26a7c3ce40562ac34563bf12e37812&req=dSAvHs1%2BmIhcX%2FMW1HO4zU8xHHuA8aIQcYV7x2Ezyhp%2BtrAxLZuF12ZkXVyY%0A2wdn%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088405936/dd681f07518d0534de5768c7/image+%2885%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=b76e8ec0e38e09bc7363950f2922b9126e26a7c3ce40562ac34563bf12e37812&req=dSAvHs1%2BmIhcX%2FMW1HO4zU8xHHuA8aIQcYV7x2Ezyhp%2BtrAxLZuF12ZkXVyY%0A2wdn%0A)
    
6.  Click **Continue**.
    
    [![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088228477/1ec6784b807447401f886298/image+%2878%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=f34487368be1c52de7781518f51d1638eade883c9b6d353a184fa451ec45d12a&req=dSAvHst8lYVYXvMW1HO4ze7Dpp4Rx280p872T1nZGpBsMomBPzA4sBhCRtYU%0AZx8p%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088228477/1ec6784b807447401f886298/image+%2878%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=f34487368be1c52de7781518f51d1638eade883c9b6d353a184fa451ec45d12a&req=dSAvHst8lYVYXvMW1HO4ze7Dpp4Rx280p872T1nZGpBsMomBPzA4sBhCRtYU%0AZx8p%0A)
    
7.  Log into your DNS Host account.
    
    [![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088236385/21d811012b7af876fa02f3ce/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=c1f187ebe3aff34c998802ebdac82b3a550f8796270d0ee691e9ae599bb79508&req=dSAvHst9m4JXXPMW1HO4zRRqEKmVES8KHYmOikrJWZPFEbxMLNZ9BZHZnwKK%0AYlZ%2F%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088236385/21d811012b7af876fa02f3ce/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=c1f187ebe3aff34c998802ebdac82b3a550f8796270d0ee691e9ae599bb79508&req=dSAvHst9m4JXXPMW1HO4zRRqEKmVES8KHYmOikrJWZPFEbxMLNZ9BZHZnwKK%0AYlZ%2F%0A)
    
8.  If we detect an existing SPF record we will present the proposed changes. After reviewing them click on **Okay, Continue**.
    
9.  Click **Done**.
    

Point the DKIM record to Valimail Align
---------------------------------------

1.  Go to app.valimail.com and log into your Align account.
    
2.  Click on **DOMAINS**.
    
    [![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088217686/f06c217dd9abea4c04508c97/image+%2874%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=ca8497f2192cd9c79c65d87b81d844aff55930f171f6ccb5a39494a3c47ed108&req=dSAvHst%2FmodXX%2FMW1HO4zbfvt%2Bolz4zYHApMfS129JuajfWRozH63xttvWZj%0AMbKU%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088217686/f06c217dd9abea4c04508c97/image+%2874%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=ca8497f2192cd9c79c65d87b81d844aff55930f171f6ccb5a39494a3c47ed108&req=dSAvHst%2FmodXX%2FMW1HO4zbfvt%2Bolz4zYHApMfS129JuajfWRozH63xttvWZj%0AMbKU%0A)
    
3.  Click on the **Domain Name** that you want to connect.
    
    [![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088221228/29f2df0bf278b591df3fc1aa/image+%2875%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=5f73b0d7902bd1b2d0dd0f38a2b8c438a399c87f259e801be6593c44ec3a91e3&req=dSAvHst8nINdUfMW1HO4zVq3cqKdpIpqKd86g9mx8tMtZK%2FFnodNi%2FWQG8CK%0A39sE%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088221228/29f2df0bf278b591df3fc1aa/image+%2875%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=5f73b0d7902bd1b2d0dd0f38a2b8c438a399c87f259e801be6593c44ec3a91e3&req=dSAvHst8nINdUfMW1HO4zVq3cqKdpIpqKd86g9mx8tMtZK%2FFnodNi%2FWQG8CK%0A39sE%0A)
    
4.  Click on the **DKIM Record** button.
    
    [![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088406907/ba6d9cd633452e7d4dc9a835/image+%2886%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=c590d29366cb9d85a811b0a1df1a12815e5638aeaa43d3a2d25034ef39019bb9&req=dSAvHs1%2Bm4hfXvMW1HO4za%2B7cN2JwnWAPg0AY7DJstSU%2BdpJ4xiN7tfG9puw%0AQrMW%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088406907/ba6d9cd633452e7d4dc9a835/image+%2886%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=c590d29366cb9d85a811b0a1df1a12815e5638aeaa43d3a2d25034ef39019bb9&req=dSAvHs1%2Bm4hfXvMW1HO4za%2B7cN2JwnWAPg0AY7DJstSU%2BdpJ4xiN7tfG9puw%0AQrMW%0A)
    
5.  Click on the link under **Recommended: Connect Automatically**.
    
    [![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088407028/3c9483a83ddaf365ae05afd8/image+%2887%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=3c6ae09b6430f3f3484cb0f18b939b3e37d8ff337b51016a08175ad66ad663a7&req=dSAvHs1%2BmoFdUfMW1HO4za9KxIML8AXzsgVR%2BNlVajtEFnNitUfdoUat1vDQ%0AeCjJ%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088407028/3c9483a83ddaf365ae05afd8/image+%2887%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=3c6ae09b6430f3f3484cb0f18b939b3e37d8ff337b51016a08175ad66ad663a7&req=dSAvHs1%2BmoFdUfMW1HO4za9KxIML8AXzsgVR%2BNlVajtEFnNitUfdoUat1vDQ%0AeCjJ%0A)
    
6.  Click **Continue**.
    
    [![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088228477/1ec6784b807447401f886298/image+%2878%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=f34487368be1c52de7781518f51d1638eade883c9b6d353a184fa451ec45d12a&req=dSAvHst8lYVYXvMW1HO4ze7Dpp4Rx280p872T1nZGpBsMomBPzA4sBhCRtYU%0AZx8p%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088228477/1ec6784b807447401f886298/image+%2878%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=f34487368be1c52de7781518f51d1638eade883c9b6d353a184fa451ec45d12a&req=dSAvHst8lYVYXvMW1HO4ze7Dpp4Rx280p872T1nZGpBsMomBPzA4sBhCRtYU%0AZx8p%0A)
    
7.  Log into your DNS Host account.
    
    [![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088236385/21d811012b7af876fa02f3ce/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=c1f187ebe3aff34c998802ebdac82b3a550f8796270d0ee691e9ae599bb79508&req=dSAvHst9m4JXXPMW1HO4zRRqEKmVES8KHYmOikrJWZPFEbxMLNZ9BZHZnwKK%0AYlZ%2F%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088236385/21d811012b7af876fa02f3ce/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=c1f187ebe3aff34c998802ebdac82b3a550f8796270d0ee691e9ae599bb79508&req=dSAvHst9m4JXXPMW1HO4zRRqEKmVES8KHYmOikrJWZPFEbxMLNZ9BZHZnwKK%0AYlZ%2F%0A)
    
8.  Click **Done**.
    

Frequently Asked Questions
--------------------------

#### Why am I not seeing the option to Connect Automatically?

The option to automatically connect is not available if your domain is hosted by a DNS provider that doesn't support this feature. You can still manually publish the SPF and DKIM records in your external DNS by following the video guide [here](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9336435-video-guide-how-to-point-the-dmarc-spf-and-dkim-records-to-valimail)
.

#### I don't have access to the external DNS, can I forward these instructions to my admin?

Yes, you can! When you get to the step where you need to log into the DNS Host account, you are given the option to forward the login to someone else. Share the link with your DNS admin, and he can continue the process with Steps 7-9.

[![forward to someone else](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088330853/7fb3102e7f5d4a510e4c9da9/image+%2881%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=4a7746cccba6e8891e298de06ee63e6a9df53af1adacffbffcaa5d4dd5f32780&req=dSAvHsp9nYlaWvMW1HO4zdCQJ2Pl5M0MPsYBH%2F%2Fnrj1NXxhrQBTRZdyFMweI%0AUoE6%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/1088330853/7fb3102e7f5d4a510e4c9da9/image+%2881%29.png?expires=1755792000&signature=4a7746cccba6e8891e298de06ee63e6a9df53af1adacffbffcaa5d4dd5f32780&req=dSAvHsp9nYlaWvMW1HO4zdCQJ2Pl5M0MPsYBH%2F%2Fnrj1NXxhrQBTRZdyFMweI%0AUoE6%0A)

#### After following these steps the domain configuration page still shows the DMARC Record as not being configured. Should I be concerned?

This is expected when making changes in the external DNS. It may take anywhere from a few minutes to maybe an hour for the change to propagate.

# Understanding the Subdomains Report | Valimail Help Center

[Skip to main content](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/9757558-understanding-the-subdomains-report#main-content)

[All Collections](https://support.valimail.com/en/)

[Valimail Suite](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/3986010-valimail-suite)

[Enforce](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/6449838-enforce)

Understanding the Subdomains Report

Understanding the Subdomains Report
===================================

This report provides data on subdomains with distinct DMARC configurations, detailing their email authentication and delivery performance, as well as any suspicious activity detected.

Updated over 7 months ago

This report is available for Premium and Enterprise Enforce packages and is included only upon request.

To access the report, expand the **Reports** section from the left side menu and click on **Subdomains**.

[![reports](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/v04853c9/1346633439/855e5861a26e1915c2831c2567a2/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=2a6e5d592d2dcd82502f9b4951f37ee2bdaa9fd2ed8edbf41234de6cfb744618&req=dSMjEM99noVcUPMW1HO4zQKdMQ%2Fz8q4VviVR7EEfvxDOC8M%2BxKOjaZhktBwC%0A%2B3OSD6f8Ibom6cgr2Qg%3D%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/v04853c9/1346633439/855e5861a26e1915c2831c2567a2/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=2a6e5d592d2dcd82502f9b4951f37ee2bdaa9fd2ed8edbf41234de6cfb744618&req=dSMjEM99noVcUPMW1HO4zQKdMQ%2Fz8q4VviVR7EEfvxDOC8M%2BxKOjaZhktBwC%0A%2B3OSD6f8Ibom6cgr2Qg%3D%0A)

Within the report, you can filter by Organizational Domain, Subdomain, Subdomain Status, Senders, and Date Ranges. The senders list will display all services that have sent mail for the selected subdomain. Date range options include the previous day, the last 7 days, the last month, or up to the last 6 months. If no specific subdomain is selected before running the report, it will display data for all subdomains.

The **Subdomain Status** filter offers the following options:

*   **Independent DMARC Config** - There is a DMARC record published on the subdomain.
    
*   **Inherit Config from Org Domain** - There is no DMARC record published on the subdomain, therefore the DMARC record is inherited from the Organizational domain.
    
*   **Not at Enforcement** - There is no Reject or Quarantine DMARC policy enforced on the subdomain.
    
*   **Not Configured** - The subdomain or organizational domain is not pointing its DMARC record to Valimail.
    
*   **Single Sender** - The subdomain is configured as a [single sender](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466363-how-to-add-a-new-sender-to-your-domain-s-spf-configuration#When-do-I-use-the-Single-Sender-option?&nbsp;:~:text=to%20do%20this%3F-,When%20do%20I%20use%20the%20Single%20Sender%20option%3F,-All%20Collections)
    .
    
*   **Any** - Show all subdomains.
    

The report will provide details on total email volume, suspicious email volume, DMARC pass rate, SPF pass rate, DKIM pass rate, percentages of quarantined and rejected emails, and emails allowed through with or without DMARC enforcement or policy override. It will also include links to redirect you to the authentication report page.

Users can download the report as a CSV file using the Download CSV button on the top right corner (below the Apply button).

Below is an example of the Subdomains Report page:

[![subdomains report](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/v04853c9/1346682208/a9504374ae513cd759d92aaa8849/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=c035b377a36a36e291762c5bbda85e1efe1288a1923c9b8c61b621ca6828ccf6&req=dSMjEM92n4NfUfMW1HO4zb0klTO027CmcPlmi2lGtSv5UejNjQPXYCEECqc7%0AqNOXlif5AnqjxD3O4xw%3D%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/v04853c9/1346682208/a9504374ae513cd759d92aaa8849/image.png?expires=1755792000&signature=c035b377a36a36e291762c5bbda85e1efe1288a1923c9b8c61b621ca6828ccf6&req=dSMjEM92n4NfUfMW1HO4zb0klTO027CmcPlmi2lGtSv5UejNjQPXYCEECqc7%0AqNOXlif5AnqjxD3O4xw%3D%0A)

*   **Total Email:** The total number of emails sent by the recognized sender on your behalf within the specified timeframe.
    
*   **Suspicious Email:** The number of emails flagged as suspicious due to failures in email authentication.
    
*   **DMARC Pass Rate:** The percentage of emails from the sender that successfully passed DMARC authentication within the given timeframe.
    
*   **SPF Pass Rate:** The percentage of emails from the sender that passed DMARC authentication through SPF alignment during the specified timeframe.
    
*   **DKIM Pass Rate:** The percentage of emails from the sender that passed DMARC authentication through DKIM alignment within the given timeframe.
    
*   **Allowed Through - No Enforcement:** The number of emails sent by the sender from domains you own that are not under DMARC enforcement. These emails bypass DMARC checks and are delivered to inboxes, which may pose a risk for exact-domain impersonation attacks. This number should ideally be zero once DMARC enforcement is fully applied.
    
*   **Allowed Through - Policy Override:** The number of emails that failed DMARC authentication but were permitted due to a policy override. This occurs when the receiver chooses to disregard the DMARC policy, such as when forwarding emails that are recognized as non-malicious despite authentication failures.
    
*   **Allowed Through - With Enforcement:** The number of emails that passed DMARC authentication were successfully delivered and were sent from domains that are under DMARC enforcement.
    
*   **Quarantined:** The number of emails from domains under enforcement that were marked as spam by the recipient’s email provider due to failing DMARC authentication.
    
*   **Rejected:** The number of emails from domains under enforcement that failed DMARC authentication and were rejected before reaching the recipient's inbox.
    

This Subdomains Report includes only subdomains that have recorded traffic; those without traffic are not included in the list.

* * *

# Microsoft Brands Program (Business Profiles) is placed on Hold | Valimail Help Center

[Skip to main content](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466390-microsoft-brands-program-business-profiles-is-placed-on-hold#main-content)

[All Collections](https://support.valimail.com/en/)

[Valimail Suite](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/3986010-valimail-suite)

[Amplify](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/6449839-amplify)

Microsoft Brands Program (Business Profiles) is placed on Hold

Microsoft Brands Program (Business Profiles) is placed on Hold
==============================================================

Updated over a year ago

Microsoft Brands Program (Business Profiles) is Microsoft's own inbox branding program.

The Microsoft Business Profiles team has notified all partners recently, that they are assessing other logo support options for the inbox, so they are **pausing** new onboardings for the **Microsoft Business Profiles/Brands** program.

The general hope is that it will be replaced with support for the BIMI standard, as they started to express interest in adopting the BIMI brand, but MS has not stated their official plans as of yet.

They will continue to honor the logos already in the system/being supported, but they are no longer accepting new customers for their Microsoft Business Profiles/Brands program. We hope to soon learn more about the logo support route they'll be taking (ideally, it'd be BIMI).

We will update this article when we will have more news from Microsoft as to whether they will want to implement BIMI as an inbox brand to their mailboxes.

Until then, if you have any question and/or wish to know more about this topic, please please don't hesitate to submit a [**ticket**](https://support.valimail.com/support/tickets/new)
 to Valimail Support and also consult our [**blog**](https://www.valimail.com/blog/the-benefits-of-bimi/)
 for any news/updates.

* * *

# How to Point BIMI to Valimail | Valimail Help Center

[Skip to main content](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466388-how-to-point-bimi-to-valimail#main-content)

[All Collections](https://support.valimail.com/en/)

[Valimail Suite](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/3986010-valimail-suite)

[Amplify](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/6449839-amplify)

How to Point BIMI to Valimail

How to Point BIMI to Valimail
=============================

Updated over 3 months ago

This process should be completed for each domain you wish to manage within Valimail Amplify®

Please make sure you've added all of your existing BIMI records to Valimail before making this configuration change.

To manage BIMI records through Valimail for your domain, please add the following NS record for the '\_bimi' subdomain to your DNS:

Record Type: NS

Hostname: \_bimi.**_YOUR\_DOMAIN_**.

Value: ns.vali.email.

We recommend a TTL of 300 seconds, although using a longer TTL (up to 3600 seconds) should be fine if you'd like to reduce the load on your DNS server.

Please note that because of existing DNS TTLs, it may take some time for Valimail to detect that you've updated your DNS with the correct settings.

Log in to [Amplify®](https://app.valimail.com/amplify)
 to check if your domain has been properly configured

Wondering what comes next? Check out [this](https://www.valimail.com/blog/bimi-compatible-logos/)
 blog post to learn how to create a BIMI-Ready logo.

* * *

# Amplify (BIMI) & Logos FAQ | Valimail Help Center

[Skip to main content](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466389-amplify-bimi-logos-faq#main-content)

[All Collections](https://support.valimail.com/en/)

[Valimail Suite](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/3986010-valimail-suite)

[Amplify](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/6449839-amplify)

Amplify (BIMI) & Logos FAQ

Amplify (BIMI) & Logos FAQ
==========================

Updated over 3 weeks ago

This article will be split out into separate articles over time, so check the folder for other articles that may be of help.

**I don't see my logo in X client, why is that?**

**I don't see our corporate logo when I sent a test message to my personal Yahoo! address, why not?**

Not all desktop and mobile apps are supported. For example, Gmail's web application will display logos for the org domains and subdomains which have their own DMARC policies and BIMI selector, but as of Oct 7, 2021 they were not displaying the logos for subdomains in their **mobile** GMail client due to an issue they were hoping to clear up soon.

There have also been reports of differences between the Gmail iOS app and the Android App. See [Google's site](https://cloud.google.com/blog/products/identity-security/bringing-bimi-to-gmail-in-google-workspace)
 for more information.

Yahoo! Mail may display differently depending on the client (desktop/mobile) and where the email is coming from. While Yahoo! supports BIMI, for personal mailboxes they display the BIMI logo with preferences towards bulk marketing systems. See [this page](https://developer.yahooinc.com/mail/bimi/)
 for more information.

**Where is BIMI supported currently?**

Check in with the BIMI Group which publishes an **infographic here.**

[![Screenshot from Oct 7, 2021:](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-7.com/i/o/851211992/de810a02aa264e300be136f3/2CQ8vrPqsOEV-uh6mCEQ0kj6IxBWSygQUQ.png-1633642240?expires=1755792000&signature=4b2b05efc8f92c9772860cf9e4b4a94f8e5bc8b03804c4f4c54a27097c3052b3&req=fCUmFMh%2FlIhdFb4f3HP0gL4Ycr6xhenXUbKR9kToCqmFd4BSkgY31%2B2LMC5s%0AUMwcFgb7uVBXg7Cpvw%3D%3D%0A)](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-7.com/i/o/851211992/de810a02aa264e300be136f3/2CQ8vrPqsOEV-uh6mCEQ0kj6IxBWSygQUQ.png-1633642240?expires=1755792000&signature=4b2b05efc8f92c9772860cf9e4b4a94f8e5bc8b03804c4f4c54a27097c3052b3&req=fCUmFMh%2FlIhdFb4f3HP0gL4Ycr6xhenXUbKR9kToCqmFd4BSkgY31%2B2LMC5s%0AUMwcFgb7uVBXg7Cpvw%3D%3D%0A)

**Why is Microsoft not on that list?**

Microsoft supports DMARC and DMARC initiatives. We do not have specific timelines on their support of BIMI because up until recently, Microsoft had their own brands program, their "Business Profiles" being a functionality in their systems.

**Update**: The Microsoft Brands Program (Business Profiles) has been put on hold by Microsoft at present time.

The general hope is that it will be replaced with BIMI, as they started to express interest in adopting the BIMI brand.

Please see this [article](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466390-microsoft-brands-program-business-profiles-is-placed-on-hold)
 for more info.

* * *

[Skip to main content](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466387-getting-started-with-bimi-and-amplify#main-content)

[Amplify](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/6449839-amplify)

Getting Started with BIMI and Amplify

Getting Started with BIMI and Amplify
=====================================

Updated over 2 months ago

Table of contents

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466387-getting-started-with-bimi-and-amplify#h_4d71f66f34)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466387-getting-started-with-bimi-and-amplify#h_3c64a9c096)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466387-getting-started-with-bimi-and-amplify#h_aff7a7c831)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466387-getting-started-with-bimi-and-amplify#h_d658bd20d6)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466387-getting-started-with-bimi-and-amplify#h_0b74d84e83)

At Valimail, we want our customers to enjoy all the benefits of authenticating their email, and today that includes **Brand Indicators for Message Identification**, also known as BIMI. BIMI provides a way for domain owners to have their logo displayed with their email messages when mail is sent to participating mailbox providers under certain conditions. This promotes better brand recognition and higher recipient trust for your email, and should in turn drive higher levels of engagement.

To fully participate in BIMI, a domain owner must meet all of the following requirements:

1.  [DMARC at Enforcement](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466387-getting-started-with-bimi-and-amplify#h_4d71f66f34)
    
2.  [SVG Tiny P/S Logo](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466387-getting-started-with-bimi-and-amplify#h_3c64a9c096)
    
3.  [Verified Mark Certificate (VMC)](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466387-getting-started-with-bimi-and-amplify#h_aff7a7c831)
     or [Common Mark Certificate (CMC)](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466387-getting-started-with-bimi-and-amplify#h_d658bd20d6)
    

DMARC at Enforcement
====================

BIMI requires that both your email domain and your organizational domain (if different) have published DMARC policies that are “at enforcement”. This means:

1.  The records’ p= tag must have a value of “quarantine” or “reject”
    
2.  If the tag is p=quarantine, the value of the pct tag, if present, must be “100”
    
3.  Neither record can have an sp= tag with a value of “none”
    

SVG Tiny P/S Logo
=================

The logos used for BIMI must be in a specific format, called “SVG Tiny Portable Secure”. See [https://www.valimail.com/blog/bimi-compatible-logos/](https://www.valimail.com/blog/bimi-compatible-logos/)
 for more information on this format.

Verified Mark Certificate (VMC) and Registered Trademark
========================================================

Some mailbox providers require that logos used with BIMI be verified as associated with the domain through the issuance of a VMC. Certification Authorities that issue VMCs are currently requiring that logos be registered trademarks in a limited number of jurisdictions around the world.

### Which Jurisdictions?

Currently supported jurisdictions are the United States, Canada, most of Europe, Japan, and Australia. As of July 2021, the following are supported:

*   United States - US Patent & Trademark Office
    
*   Canada - Canadian Intellectual Property Office
    
*   European Union - EU Intellectual Property Office
    
*   United Kingdom - UK Intellectual Property Office
    
*   Germany - Deutsches Patent - und Markenamt
    
*   Japan Trademark Office
    
*   Australia - IP Australia
    

The full list can be found [in this document](https://bimigroup.org/resources/VMC_Guidelines_latest.pdf)
 (PDF) from the BIMI Group.

### How Do I Know If My Company Has a Registered Trademark?

You can check the World Intellectual Property Organization’s ([WIPO](https://www3.wipo.int/branddb/en/#)
). If your organization’s logo can be found and has an active, registered trademark, you may use your logo to obtain a BIMI certificate. Otherwise, check in with your Legal team.

### What If We Don’t Have a Registered Trademark or Have One in a Different Jurisdiction?

At present, not all mailbox providers require Verified Mark Certificates (VMCs) to support the display of logos through BIMI, so as long as your DMARC policy is correctly configured, you can still partially participate in BIMI. In addition to VMCs, there's now an alternative path available through [Common Mark Certificates (CMC)](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466387-getting-started-with-bimi-and-amplify#h_d658bd20d6)
, which offer a way to display your logo without the need for a registered trademark. This makes CMCs a more accessible option for organizations that may not yet have trademark protection in a supported jurisdiction. The BIMI standards body also has plans to broaden access over time, including expanding support for more jurisdictions and logo options, so even if you're currently unable to meet all the VMC requirements, there are now other ways to start building your BIMI presence.

Common Mark Certificate (CMC)
=============================

Previously, getting BIMI on Gmail required a Verified Mark Certificate (VMC) tied to a trademarked logo, a costly and time-consuming process that limited flexibility. Now, Google has announced support for Common Mark Certificates (CMCs), which don’t require a trademark. If your logo has been in use for at least a year, you can qualify for BIMI with a CMC. This update makes BIMI more accessible and expands logo display across Gmail on both mobile and desktop.

### How is a CMC different from a VMC?

The main advantage of a CMC is that it doesn’t require a trademark, and it allows minor variations in your logo, unlike a VMC, which requires an exact match to your registered trademark. Just keep in mind that only VMCs qualify for Google’s blue checkmark.

Here's a quick comparison between a VMC and a CMC:

|     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- |
|     | VMC | CMC |
| Pros | *   Logo and Google’s Blue Checkmark show on desktop and mobile<br>    <br>*   Highest security bar | *   No trademark required<br>    <br>*   Easier to obtain |
| Cons | *   Slower to obtain (if you don’t already have a trademark) | *   No Google Blue Checkmark<br>    <br>*   The logo has to have been in use for over a year |
| Blue Checkmark | Yes | No  |
| Logo Variation | No  | Yes (Minor modifications) |

Check out our blog [post](https://www.valimail.com/blog/common-mark-certificate-bimi-faq/)
 for answers to frequently asked questions about Common Mark Certificates.

Okay, I’m Ready to Obtain a VMC or a CMC; What’s Next?
======================================================

Contact your Valimail Sales Representative, who can help you through the process of getting set up with **Amplify**, our automated BIMI solution. If you are not yet a Valimail customer, email us at **[\[email protected\]](https://support.valimail.com/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#10636560607f62645066717c797d71797c3e737f7d)
**.

* * *

# Understanding the Senders Report | Valimail Help Center

[Skip to main content](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466382-understanding-the-senders-report#main-content)

[All Collections](https://support.valimail.com/en/)

[Valimail Suite](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/3986010-valimail-suite)

[Reports](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/7305721-reports)

Understanding the Senders Report

Understanding the Senders Report
================================

Updated over 5 months ago

This report is available for Premium and Enterprise Enforce packages and is included only upon request.

The Senders Report can be found by navigating to Reports->Senders

[![a screenshot of a computer](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-7.com/i/o/851211414/02de62be41f54f4c4aa79795/CHU6Q7fDQpvlwR8E9dsSSp5ltHoTNnoGxA.png-1662605107?expires=1755792000&signature=132ded06c30ae3a224a2d457c215c9b2200740b05b46acf5a29c3fa652a281f1&req=fCUmFMh%2FmYBbFb4f3HP0gCtmftFZv6nE7WLSrnf1TveGVUzxjQM8ZM7jks2Q%0AdCzs5fthlJqKPLgQfg%3D%3D%0A)](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-7.com/i/o/851211414/02de62be41f54f4c4aa79795/CHU6Q7fDQpvlwR8E9dsSSp5ltHoTNnoGxA.png-1662605107?expires=1755792000&signature=132ded06c30ae3a224a2d457c215c9b2200740b05b46acf5a29c3fa652a281f1&req=fCUmFMh%2FmYBbFb4f3HP0gCtmftFZv6nE7WLSrnf1TveGVUzxjQM8ZM7jks2Q%0AdCzs5fthlJqKPLgQfg%3D%3D%0A)

This report outlines DMARC information grouped by recognized sender and defaults to the last 7 days across all of your domains.

Columns on the report

*   **Sender:** The name of the recognized sender that is sending mail on behalf of your domains
    
*   **Total Emails:** The number of emails that the recognized sender sent on your behalf in the given timeframe
    
*   **Allowed Through - No Enforcement:** This shows the number of emails sent by the given sender from domains you own that are not at DMARC enforcement. All emails represented in this status get through to the inboxes they’re sent to, regardless of which sender sent them. While that’s not a problem for legitimate emails you send, it represents a major risk of exact-domain impersonation attacks. Once you reach enforcement, giving you full control and protection over outbound emails from your domain(s), this number will be zero.
    
*   **Allowed Through - Policy Override:** The number of emails sent by this sender that failed DMARC authentication but were allowed through due to an override. An override is a decision by the receiver to ignore the DMARC policy. A good example is Gmail overriding a failed DMARC alignment in order to accept a forwarded group email that it’s certain is actually non-malicious.
    
*   **Allowed Through - With Enforcement:** This shows emails from the sender that passed DMARC authentication, were successfully delivered, and were sent from domains that are at enforcement.
    
*   **Quarantined:** Represents part of the message volume from domains at enforcement, showing the number of emails marked as spam by the end user’s email provider as a result of failing DMARC authentication.
    
*   **Rejected:** Represents a part of the enforced domain message volume, showing the number of emails that failed DMARC authentication and never reached the inbox.
    
*   **Overall DMARC pass rate:** The percentage of mail from the sender that passed DMARC in the given timeframe
    
*   **Pass rate with SPF:** Percentage of mail from this sender in the given timeframe that passed DMARC via SPF alignment
    
*   **Pass rate with DKIM:** Percentage of mail from this sender in the given timeframe that passed DMARC via DKIM alignment
    
*   **Domains:** The number of domains that the sender was seen on in the given timeframe
    
*   **Countries:** The number of originating countries for the sender in the given timeframe
    

* * *

# Domain Executive Report | Valimail Help Center

[Skip to main content](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/10742496-domain-executive-report#main-content)

[All Collections](https://support.valimail.com/en/)

[Valimail Suite](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/3986010-valimail-suite)

[Reports](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/7305721-reports)

Domain Executive Report

Domain Executive Report
=======================

This article will explain the Domain Executive Report as well as give recommendations based on its information

Updated over 5 months ago

The Domain Executive report is a feature available for all packages of our product Enforce. This feature is similar to the Account Overview feature however it is centered around an individual domain and goes more in-depth into the wins/positives of the specified domain. It is intended to provide a quick recap of all the value provided by Valimail for a specific domain in a selected month.

In fact, the Domain Executive Report page can be found in the main dashboard right under the Account Overview page:

[![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/v04853c9/1415207234/a80471ecc28e13766cceab1c7e2d/Domain+Executive+Report+location.png?expires=1755792000&signature=26009477bfe9c62411cdfad572cfdbed5b5e6e8e8835074b10393ba9fec784d7&req=dSQmE8t%2BmoNcXfMW1HO4za2t9LGGeC8K4lGfezL4MzepENiuw3QRc%2BHjnarp%0AW1lW26ZbDFyhy%2BC%2BaYk%3D%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/v04853c9/1415207234/a80471ecc28e13766cceab1c7e2d/Domain+Executive+Report+location.png?expires=1755792000&signature=26009477bfe9c62411cdfad572cfdbed5b5e6e8e8835074b10393ba9fec784d7&req=dSQmE8t%2BmoNcXfMW1HO4za2t9LGGeC8K4lGfezL4MzepENiuw3QRc%2BHjnarp%0AW1lW26ZbDFyhy%2BC%2BaYk%3D%0A)

The Domain Executive Report is meant to showcase the overall status of a chosen domain in a specific calendar month. To do so, select the domain and date from the top of the page then click "APPLY".

[![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/v04853c9/1415227871/f6958c243a8fa3e3a1492ca9853b/filter.png?expires=1755792000&signature=104eb4d1dccf03801196bd5957d39632d71c4af3880dd009db74a6897cc278fb&req=dSQmE8t8molYWPMW1HO4zdIvAa2CTYNZMZdCfz4WUM41IgFEjCtDCBpHbSBQ%0ARTpdYzcE5bBCRgW3BtU%3D%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/v04853c9/1415227871/f6958c243a8fa3e3a1492ca9853b/filter.png?expires=1755792000&signature=104eb4d1dccf03801196bd5957d39632d71c4af3880dd009db74a6897cc278fb&req=dSQmE8t8molYWPMW1HO4zdIvAa2CTYNZMZdCfz4WUM41IgFEjCtDCBpHbSBQ%0ARTpdYzcE5bBCRgW3BtU%3D%0A)

If the selected date is the current month, the page will show only the data we ingested from month to date.

The page is split into four sections:

"**Email Insights**" will show the total email volume sent on behalf of your domain during the specified time as well as the number of emails that passed and failed authentication. It will also specify the DMARC policy currently set on the domain. If the policy is "None" and the DMARC pass rate of the domain is 95% or higher we recommend switching to enforcement for better protection. If the DMARC pass rate is under 95% we recommend reviewing the traffic in the "Authentication report" of the domain to see what senders are not authenticated. If you discover a failing sender that is legitimately used to send emails on behalf of your domain, you may check our [Knowledge base](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/7633239-email-service-providers)
 for steps to configure it for DMARC.

"**Enabled Senders Insights**" provides you insights into the 3rd party senders that you allow to send email on your behalf. This will show the top 3 sending services by volume that are enabled under the domain as well as how many of your enabled senders were used in the specified month and how many are passing DMARC. If some of those senders are not passing authentication we recommend reviewing their DMARC configuration by referring to our [Knowledge base](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/7633239-email-service-providers)
. If you believe the configuration is in order we recommend reaching out to our capable support team!

"**Suspicious mail stopped by Valimail**" showcases a global view of all the suspicious emails that Valimail has protected your customers from. This is shown in a world map with different shades of red depending on the total email volume of each region. We consider suspicious traffic emails that are failing DMARC and are being sent by a nonreputable sender.

If the domain is not at enforcement, this section will be called "**Email Authenticated by Valimail**" and will showcase traffic that passes DMARC authentication instead.

"**Domain Insights**" provides you with a list of all the features currently in use for this domain.

[![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/v04853c9/1415300078/637f87ddfeb69f9e1fa65f09e6f7/Domain+insights.png?expires=1755792000&signature=8b43417cc27480cb34cb47d131298cd363cf14e33ff39bf15189b39c3cb98822&req=dSQmE8p%2BnYFYUfMW1HO4zTmTCAq%2FOuoqejjYB946%2F8fWlYaGagg0bWjQmV5Z%0AHjHbUaDj0U3EJR6evMU%3D%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/v04853c9/1415300078/637f87ddfeb69f9e1fa65f09e6f7/Domain+insights.png?expires=1755792000&signature=8b43417cc27480cb34cb47d131298cd363cf14e33ff39bf15189b39c3cb98822&req=dSQmE8p%2BnYFYUfMW1HO4zTmTCAq%2FOuoqejjYB946%2F8fWlYaGagg0bWjQmV5Z%0AHjHbUaDj0U3EJR6evMU%3D%0A)

This list may include:

*   DMARC Pointed to Valimail
    
*   DMARC Record is Syntactically Valid
    
*   SPF Record Pointed to Valimail
    
*   DKIM Record Pointed to Valimail
    
*   DMARC is at Enforcement
    
*   BIMI Enabled
    
*   Service Authentication
    
*   Internal Service Visibility
    
*   Microsoft/Google Integration
    

* * *

Finally, this page also has a "Print PDF" button. We recommend the following print configurations for the best visibility:

Pages: "All"

Layout: "Portrait"

Paper size: "Letter"

Page per sheet: 1

Margins: "Minimum"

Scale: "Default"

Headers and footers & Background graphics: "Enabled"

* * *

Understanding Executive Reports

Understanding Executive Reports
===============================

Updated over a year ago

Table of contents

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466381-understanding-executive-reports#When-does-the-executive-report-get-sent-out?)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466381-understanding-executive-reports#Who-Receives-the-Executive-Report?)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466381-understanding-executive-reports#h_4dc5429fe6)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466381-understanding-executive-reports#What-does-the-data-mean?)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466381-understanding-executive-reports#h_92d7105b6f)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466381-understanding-executive-reports#h_fd3b151854)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466381-understanding-executive-reports#h_2fd6840e42)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466381-understanding-executive-reports#h_651044499f)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466381-understanding-executive-reports#h_a4ab59b7bc)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466381-understanding-executive-reports#h_ee1c797fb2)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466381-understanding-executive-reports#h_0a2a4e693a)

Applicable Products - Valimail Enforce®

When does the executive report get sent out?
============================================

The automated executive report gets sent out on a monthly basis. You should expect to receive your report on the first of every month.

Who Receives the Executive Report?
==================================

Users who meet the following criteria are auto-enrolled in the report:

1.  Have the Owner role assigned to them
    
2.  Account has at least one domain at enforcement (quarantine or reject)
    
3.  Must have a subscription for Enforce®
    

How do I enable the Executive Report?
=====================================

  
For Enforce® subscription accounts:

1.  Navigate to the Enforce Settings by using the left-side panel and click on Alerts.  
    ​
    
    [![a screenshot of a blue screen](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-7.com/i/o/851211371/735eab6cd2fff1a00b4280d9/sXWdWXKcziEK-2TLJ-ElAoIF2W5BLakBVw.png-1670006317?expires=1755792000&signature=ec2aff7583ee210f291ed653372da6edd50105ae16493276d57aa0ee4a8d0046&req=fCUmFMh%2FnoZeFb4f3HP0gC8Ki%2BCeK0RtPW7DRMh9gAIMhhZT%2BFjCRArBPIU%2B%0A3KE%3D%0A)](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-7.com/i/o/851211371/735eab6cd2fff1a00b4280d9/sXWdWXKcziEK-2TLJ-ElAoIF2W5BLakBVw.png-1670006317?expires=1755792000&signature=ec2aff7583ee210f291ed653372da6edd50105ae16493276d57aa0ee4a8d0046&req=fCUmFMh%2FnoZeFb4f3HP0gC8Ki%2BCeK0RtPW7DRMh9gAIMhhZT%2BFjCRArBPIU%2B%0A3KE%3D%0A)
    
2.  Under the Create a Custom Alert for Your Account section click on the Type of Alert to open the dropdown menu and select the Executive Report.  
    ​
    
    [![a screenshot of a computer](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-7.com/i/o/851211384/2266340a0769b0fbf928ef8a/6IgBF0f4YhCUYNJPymaK7wJwwB8-OyV39g.png-1670006134?expires=1755792000&signature=0e42fd7c1b03fdbb0f4077a5ec25b2f14841e70959f6a23923823b1774ea2772&req=fCUmFMh%2FnolbFb4f3HP0gN578SBgxPV7rsU4THODDw%2FL0zB6kJT6VRI1YhGS%0AHLc%3D%0A)](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-7.com/i/o/851211384/2266340a0769b0fbf928ef8a/6IgBF0f4YhCUYNJPymaK7wJwwB8-OyV39g.png-1670006134?expires=1755792000&signature=0e42fd7c1b03fdbb0f4077a5ec25b2f14841e70959f6a23923823b1774ea2772&req=fCUmFMh%2FnolbFb4f3HP0gN578SBgxPV7rsU4THODDw%2FL0zB6kJT6VRI1YhGS%0AHLc%3D%0A)
    
3.  Click on Add a Custom Alert once the Executive Report is selected to begin the setup.  
    ​
    
    [![a screenshot of a login page](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-7.com/i/o/851211392/099d4ad65b24951de7b0db3b/5FDdd-A2eWFUseIcEhSbTZgguQDjkQ9JfQ.png-1670006369?expires=1755792000&signature=0b50e82def692886be07869e2ca6cc9c636e0f48fca3722a89cb5e1f2fb09ee0&req=fCUmFMh%2FnohdFb4f3HP0gG6%2FpOU29sVBzhfWq90CxrxjOtIUXIvnMLTtfW3U%0AG3A%3D%0A)](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-7.com/i/o/851211392/099d4ad65b24951de7b0db3b/5FDdd-A2eWFUseIcEhSbTZgguQDjkQ9JfQ.png-1670006369?expires=1755792000&signature=0b50e82def692886be07869e2ca6cc9c636e0f48fca3722a89cb5e1f2fb09ee0&req=fCUmFMh%2FnohdFb4f3HP0gG6%2FpOU29sVBzhfWq90CxrxjOtIUXIvnMLTtfW3U%0AG3A%3D%0A)
    
4.  In the Email Address field input your business email, and optionally, use the dropdown menu under Cadence to choose how often the Executive reports are sent (Daily, Weekly, or Monthly - default).  
    ​
    
    [![a screenshot of a report](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-7.com/i/o/851211399/80d01af09cf28df28091662e/ogr5sAHQTYTUqYqmaXI_rLnjMNi5fQdugg.png-1670006850?expires=1755792000&signature=2187742eca0698d0922eb99442ffcab9836a672748e25494c29cd8399e29f5ad&req=fCUmFMh%2FnohWFb4f3HP0gLaCF7MC5SZypAybCHvIS2Bi2mFVMcdRFGnfggIv%0A%2BZY%3D%0A)](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-7.com/i/o/851211399/80d01af09cf28df28091662e/ogr5sAHQTYTUqYqmaXI_rLnjMNi5fQdugg.png-1670006850?expires=1755792000&signature=2187742eca0698d0922eb99442ffcab9836a672748e25494c29cd8399e29f5ad&req=fCUmFMh%2FnohWFb4f3HP0gLaCF7MC5SZypAybCHvIS2Bi2mFVMcdRFGnfggIv%0A%2BZY%3D%0A)
    
5.  Click Add Custom Alert.  
    ​
    

**Note:** This feature is available for Enforce® Pro and Enforce® Enterprise.

What does the data mean?
========================

Potential Phish Blocked
-----------------------

This shows you the number of emails across all of your enforced domains where the DMARC disposition was quarantine or reject and was not overridden. This number typically represents emails from senders that you do not allow to send email on your behalf.

If you see a high volume of blocked email, that could indicate a couple of things

*   You had a large-scale phishing attempt using your domain names in the last month. Don't worry, this was blocked and Valimail is doing its job
    
*   There is an uptick in the use of unapproved known email services. Seeing a large number of legitimate services being blocked could mean that a new email sender was set up but not approved through the proper channels
    

Authenticated
-------------

This number represents email from known Email Service Providers and your Internal Sources that are properly authenticated and passing DMARC. You'll also see a highlight of your top sending services in this section along with their respective email volume for the month. This data is important because it shows you the known good email you are delivering successfully to recipients.  
​  
​

Services Authenticated
----------------------

This category highlights the number of known email service providers that are authenticated properly across all of your domains.

Additionally, you will see information regarding how many failing services you have on your account. If you see any services listed here that are legitimate services, you will want to investigate them to see if there are issues.  
​

Protected Domains
-----------------

This is the number of domains that have DMARC pointed to Valimail via NS record and are at DMARC enforcement (quarantine or reject). The goal is to see all of your domains represented in this number. **Note:** Domain enforcement status is recorded at the first of each month for these reports

Unprotected Domains
-------------------

This is the number of domains that are either not at DMARC enforcement or are not pointed to Valimail via an NS record ("undelegated"). You might see a count of domains that are Blocked vs Sending with Enforcement. This means that the domain's status has been set to blocked. This puts the domain at p=reject and locks down SPF and DKIM responses, essentially not allowing any email to be sent from that domain. **Note:** Domain enforcement status is recorded at the first of each month for these reports

DMARC Pass Rate
---------------

This means the percentage of your total email volume that passed DMARC authentication in the past month. If you see a percentage that is 95% or above, your account is in great shape!

If you see a sudden uptrend in percentages compared to last month's report, this typically means you successfully configured high-volume sending services and they started authenticating properly sometime in the past month.

Conversely, a downtrend could indicate a few things:

*   Someone set up a new email service without proper approvals and skipped the authentication step
    
*   You had a major uptick of unapproved mail or phishing that caused your overall volume to spike
    

Possible report discrepancies
=============================

When you receive the Executive Report for the last 30 days, you might notice sometimes that the report you got on the first of the month shows a certain email volume and a certain DMARC% passing, but when you went back to look in the UI this week, the UI shows a different email volume and/or a different DMARC% of passing/failing.

The main reason for that is that we send our reports out at a certain time/date, but we may be getting DMARC reports later than that date.

DMARC aggregate reports are being sent every 24 hours, with most of them occurring in the morning usually, but some reports may be sent earlier or later that usual (it depends on the receiver's mailbox provider), which is why you may see these differences in the reports sometimes.

As always, if you have any questions about the report you received, we are just a [few clicks away](https://support.valimail.com/support/tickets/new)

* * *
