RPost RMail

RPost RMail
===========

How to set up DMARC for RPost RMail in Valimail

Updated over a year ago

Table of contents

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8758046-rpost-rmail#h_a62fbdd931)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8758046-rpost-rmail#h_e6468bcf43)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8758046-rpost-rmail#h_5ea5dfd183)

SPF(supported) / (dedicated subdomain)  
DKIM(recommended)

This article covers the SPF and DKIM authentication processes for **RPost RMail** and how they are managed in Valimail. While only one of the two authentication methods is required for an email to pass DMARC, our recommendation is to configure both whenever possible.

Configuring DKIM authentication for your RPost RMail emails
===========================================================

To set your company up with DKIM while using RMail, please follow these steps:

**1.** Download the RMail DKIM Request form which is linked below.

**2.** Complete the “Company Information” portion of the form.

[![](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-1.com/i/o/921069347/31780ec36d2cc526bf4d04f5/-WLDXId5kFmSE1qoACaB3Nc2VPS10suOmQ.png?expires=1755792000&signature=430a2a7926f8b0129da7cb234ab56754ed7ae3025efd40c0515f26bc21c250b9&req=fSImFs93noVYFb4f3HP0gFIt9nuMLmBmj1uzSEOLOAqkQLd6N6Iwc%2Bxl3qVg%0AoaUGS9rGrFSc1DOjHg%3D%3D%0A)](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-1.com/i/o/921069347/31780ec36d2cc526bf4d04f5/-WLDXId5kFmSE1qoACaB3Nc2VPS10suOmQ.png?expires=1755792000&signature=430a2a7926f8b0129da7cb234ab56754ed7ae3025efd40c0515f26bc21c250b9&req=fSImFs93noVYFb4f3HP0gFIt9nuMLmBmj1uzSEOLOAqkQLd6N6Iwc%2Bxl3qVg%0AoaUGS9rGrFSc1DOjHg%3D%3D%0A)

**3.** Save the PDF and replace \[Company Name\] with your company’s name.

**4.** Log into our support center at [https://support.rpost.com/](https://support.rpost.com/)
.

**5.** Press **Submit a Ticket**.

[![](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-1.com/i/o/921069358/9a6ea1142c3d3abffe518e56/l-XqiVu62bGQoIfezgpi3hpFgs-BabL7fA.png?expires=1755792000&signature=ab9bedb0d34d5a0f2b1d686a2d18a9a8d132c815fee07a6adcd505600cf318c7&req=fSImFs93noRXFb4f3HP0gGn9T8HS1JMnRMi1Fh0pNdS7x%2FEtKsu8RzZ78Nbz%0ATcU7jEbBgyIk4NlHNQ%3D%3D%0A)](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-1.com/i/o/921069358/9a6ea1142c3d3abffe518e56/l-XqiVu62bGQoIfezgpi3hpFgs-BabL7fA.png?expires=1755792000&signature=ab9bedb0d34d5a0f2b1d686a2d18a9a8d132c815fee07a6adcd505600cf318c7&req=fSImFs93noRXFb4f3HP0gGn9T8HS1JMnRMi1Fh0pNdS7x%2FEtKsu8RzZ78Nbz%0ATcU7jEbBgyIk4NlHNQ%3D%3D%0A)

**6.** Under **Submit a request**, select, **RMail Support**.

[![](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-1.com/i/o/921069360/a4610580069382eae516fad9/WZCE5VDBliT_UuHWBxJmuu_qpPnbaC9g1Q.png?expires=1755792000&signature=bb161226d04fad887061b86b7547adab1d849aa822a76afc7dc150bd18f82132&req=fSImFs93nodfFb4f3HP0gLiMBQEgb9XbdnE%2BZfYOc6dmsSPh2NZHVpGGh4iR%0AsTAlCWauf5fsnhbJOQ%3D%3D%0A)](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-1.com/i/o/921069360/a4610580069382eae516fad9/WZCE5VDBliT_UuHWBxJmuu_qpPnbaC9g1Q.png?expires=1755792000&signature=bb161226d04fad887061b86b7547adab1d849aa822a76afc7dc150bd18f82132&req=fSImFs93nodfFb4f3HP0gLiMBQEgb9XbdnE%2BZfYOc6dmsSPh2NZHVpGGh4iR%0AsTAlCWauf5fsnhbJOQ%3D%3D%0A)

**7.** Select **Other RMail Related Support Topic**.

[![](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-1.com/i/o/921069363/9346464021bcf148b9810d62/aYtQ-3zhRpNjbyV4OszezoMb2CMosX60FQ.png?expires=1755792000&signature=c40a4f192e9b1385eb9629cc339260dd67bb47e56b818d45694324315ebf4e25&req=fSImFs93nodcFb4f3HP0gGC6oh0qEepKs4Pxc24%2BhPeqYKLlLu9gkfL8meow%0AoBSc3gRR9PAK8kZGXA%3D%3D%0A)](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-1.com/i/o/921069363/9346464021bcf148b9810d62/aYtQ-3zhRpNjbyV4OszezoMb2CMosX60FQ.png?expires=1755792000&signature=c40a4f192e9b1385eb9629cc339260dd67bb47e56b818d45694324315ebf4e25&req=fSImFs93nodcFb4f3HP0gGC6oh0qEepKs4Pxc24%2BhPeqYKLlLu9gkfL8meow%0AoBSc3gRR9PAK8kZGXA%3D%3D%0A)

**8.** Enter the subject, **DKIM Form - <Your Company Name>**.

[![](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-1.com/i/o/921069366/cf153f68a8044500b00f5105/aqSUc7fhZ3NAMHlKnNTc31bSom_Fb2ttGw.png?expires=1755792000&signature=64e235e5ca4c5f49a2ef803898f8956ad9c2f1e2725a96025c5437a9e9339d36&req=fSImFs93nodZFb4f3HP0gDVekBOu1oJQsoadZ4TBL7eaz2iFHNVJbLbKde91%0Abp%2FcSV%2FGfaWXRpwxiA%3D%3D%0A)](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-1.com/i/o/921069366/cf153f68a8044500b00f5105/aqSUc7fhZ3NAMHlKnNTc31bSom_Fb2ttGw.png?expires=1755792000&signature=64e235e5ca4c5f49a2ef803898f8956ad9c2f1e2725a96025c5437a9e9339d36&req=fSImFs93nodZFb4f3HP0gDVekBOu1oJQsoadZ4TBL7eaz2iFHNVJbLbKde91%0Abp%2FcSV%2FGfaWXRpwxiA%3D%3D%0A)

**9.** In the **Description** text box, enter, **Please set DKIM up for my company**.

[![](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-1.com/i/o/921069368/526b8f53fe50d7875dc30f5a/ZPqHfvjOE7IQg55UzSGyXC2iRjBCbTBaBw.png?expires=1755792000&signature=9d7fdc18041c79950969ed9af1712fcffb85e6f90b1a91ccfe94cce8d4fa9ca2&req=fSImFs93nodXFb4f3HP0gEFrjYK4r4IE0TNRqaTiG0yFHugE3iK3pSR%2FEGQk%0A1dLgwgDFaAv2LgG2Vg%3D%3D%0A)](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-1.com/i/o/921069368/526b8f53fe50d7875dc30f5a/ZPqHfvjOE7IQg55UzSGyXC2iRjBCbTBaBw.png?expires=1755792000&signature=9d7fdc18041c79950969ed9af1712fcffb85e6f90b1a91ccfe94cce8d4fa9ca2&req=fSImFs93nodXFb4f3HP0gEFrjYK4r4IE0TNRqaTiG0yFHugE3iK3pSR%2FEGQk%0A1dLgwgDFaAv2LgG2Vg%3D%3D%0A)

**10.** Upload the **RMail DKIM Request** document.

[![](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-1.com/i/o/921069372/ba0fd934deddeda245a4add6/UrptObuIOpnqbru8t00HLm5cJUxLyQAO9A.png?expires=1755792000&signature=55632cba7fc58766bc2ed5dc132a6f0813421a9b97e7787781427edbc6485d62&req=fSImFs93noZdFb4f3HP0gKD0V%2FHiFln%2F3WaEeR9A%2B2mtZuPwI71RcoKktAwc%0AjjaDccKGM8v84ktbwg%3D%3D%0A)](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-1.com/i/o/921069372/ba0fd934deddeda245a4add6/UrptObuIOpnqbru8t00HLm5cJUxLyQAO9A.png?expires=1755792000&signature=55632cba7fc58766bc2ed5dc132a6f0813421a9b97e7787781427edbc6485d62&req=fSImFs93noZdFb4f3HP0gKD0V%2FHiFln%2F3WaEeR9A%2B2mtZuPwI71RcoKktAwc%0AjjaDccKGM8v84ktbwg%3D%3D%0A)

**11.** Press **Submit**.

[![](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-1.com/i/o/921069376/f5c9419e6a42ea28fdb1af13/jXTgqq83bSShSvmpKrjTMsw3RrrLKlQ4Pw.png?expires=1755792000&signature=cf49fa6d31521a5a9f918a44d8226399c48a1a77efe1e1a637548fb21ba579ee&req=fSImFs93noZZFb4f3HP0gIiZFRUkTNSkZL4wUhzeFwDmSvJS%2BMmVuT87caYr%0ABcGVmK16epXkBk8f2g%3D%3D%0A)](https://valimail-2bbeb801593d.intercom-attachments-1.com/i/o/921069376/f5c9419e6a42ea28fdb1af13/jXTgqq83bSShSvmpKrjTMsw3RrrLKlQ4Pw.png?expires=1755792000&signature=cf49fa6d31521a5a9f918a44d8226399c48a1a77efe1e1a637548fb21ba579ee&req=fSImFs93noZZFb4f3HP0gIiZFRUkTNSkZL4wUhzeFwDmSvJS%2BMmVuT87caYr%0ABcGVmK16epXkBk8f2g%3D%3D%0A)

An RMail support representative will return the completed DKIM form to you once it is complete.

You can also find the instructions on how to set up DKIM and SPF for RPost RMail, **[here](https://support.rpost.com/hc/en-us/articles/360038810554-Setting-up-DKIM-with-RMail)
**.

Add a RPost RMail DKIM key in Valimail
======================================

You can find more detailed information on how to add a DKIM key in Valimail, here:

[Add a DKIM key in Valimail](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466384-adding-a-dkim-key-in-enforce-align)

Configuring SPF authentication for your RPost RMail emails
==========================================================

Once you establish that RPost RMail is an authorized sender for your domain, you will need to add the service in your Enabled Senders.

You will find more detailed information on how to add a service for your domain in Valimail, here:

[Enabling a sender for SPF in Valimail](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8733052-how-to-enable-a-sender-for-spf-in-enforce-align)

**_Note_**: We encourage you to use the comment section for any useful information about your sending service, such as the name of the service owner, change request ticket numbers, etc.

# Salesforce Pardot | Valimail Help Center

[Skip to main content](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8758314-salesforce-pardot#main-content)

[All Collections](https://support.valimail.com/en/)

[Email Service Providers](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/7633239-email-service-providers)

[Configuration Guides](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/6449834-configuration-guides)

Salesforce Pardot

Salesforce Pardot
=================

How to set up DMARC for Salesforce Pardot in Valimail

Updated over a year ago

Website: [https://www.salesforce.com/products/marketing-cloud/marketing-automation/](https://www.salesforce.com/products/marketing-cloud/marketing-automation/)

SPF(not supported)  
DKIM(TXT record)

Some things to be aware of with Salesforce Pardot:

*   Uses the same DKIM key (selector 200608) as Salesforce Marketing Cloud
    
*   Does not use a dedicated subdomain
    
*   Pardot’s email authentication instructions specify creating a DOMAINKEY (the precursor to DKIM) record: o=~ on \_domainkey.foo.com This is obsolete and not needed. Enforce does not publish this record. Even though not publishing this will show as an error in the Pardot interface, this can be safely ignored.
    
*   Pardot’s email authentication instructions specify adding an SPF include whether the emails are SPF aligned or not. It does a simple text match and, as such, does not understand Instant SPF Macros. Even though this will show as an error in the Pardot interface, this can be safely ignored. As long as Pardot is added as an Enabled Sender in Enforce, Enforce will return the proper SPF response assuming the emails are SPF aligned.
    

Related Article:

[Salesforce Marketing Cloud](https://support.valimail.com/en/support/solutions/articles/48001074347)

* * *

[All Collections](https://support.valimail.com/en/)

[Configuration Guides](https://support.valimail.com/en/collections/6449834-configuration-guides)

Vipre

Vipre
=====

How to set up DMARC for Vipre in Valimail

Updated over a year ago

Table of contents

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8758199-vipre#h_108bdfdc1b)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8758199-vipre#h_5c637b1bb5)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8758199-vipre#h_793456ed42)

SPF(supported)  
DKIM(recommended)

This article covers the SPF and DKIM authentication processes for **Vipre** and how they are managed in Valimail. While only one of the two authentication methods is required for an email to pass DMARC, our recommendation is to configure both whenever possible.

Configuring DKIM authentication for your Vipre emails
=====================================================

To enable this feature follow the steps below:

**1.** In the portal navigate to **Service Settings** -> **Outbound Relay** -> **Outbound DKIM Signing**.

**2.** Select if wish to use 1024 or 2048 bit key (\*2048 is recommended).

**3.** Click **Generate**.

The next steps will need to be performed inside your DNS and may vary dependent on setup (This will need to be performed on all domains registered).

**Note**: If you manage DKIM in Valimail for your domain, you will need to add the TXT DKIM key on your domain's Configuration page in Valimail Enforce.

**4.** Add the DKIM key in Valimail Enforce.

**5.** Once all domains have been updated click **Validate**.

**6.** If all domains pass validation you will be able to click Enable DKIM and mail will start to be signed.

You can also find the instructions on how to set up DKIM and SPF for Vipre, **[here](https://excelmicro.kayako.com/article/523-how-do-i-configure-outbound-dkim-signing)
**.

Add a Vipre DKIM key in Valimail
================================

You can find more detailed information on how to add a DKIM key in Valimail, here:

[Add a DKIM key in Valimail](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466384-adding-a-dkim-key-in-enforce-align)

Configuring SPF authentication for your Vipre emails
====================================================

Once you establish that Vipre is an authorized sender for your domain, you will need to add the service in your Enabled Senders.

You will find more detailed information on how to add a service for your domain in Valimail, here:

[Enabling a sender for SPF in Valimail](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8733052-how-to-enable-a-sender-for-spf-in-enforce-align)

**_Note_**: We encourage you to use the comment section for any useful information about your sending service, such as the name of the service owner, change request ticket numbers, etc.

* * *

Wordfly

Wordfly
=======

How to set up DMARC for Wordfly in Valimail

Updated over a year ago

Table of contents

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8758204-wordfly#h_0fb39d823b)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8758204-wordfly#h_ed6824592c)

[](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8758204-wordfly#h_b9b2e64309)

SPF(supported)  
DKIM(recommended)

This article covers the SPF and DKIM authentication processes for **Wordfly** and how they are managed in Valimail. While only one of the two authentication methods is required for an email to pass DMARC, our recommendation is to configure both whenever possible.

Configuring DKIM authentication for your Wordfly emails
=======================================================

In order to set up DKIM in Wordfly for your domain, yo uwill need to [email their support](https://support.valimail.com/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#1d6e686d6d726f695d6a726f797b7164337e7270)
 to request a DKIM record for your domain.

If you manage DKIM for your domain in Valimail, the provided key will need to be added in your domain's Configuration page in Valimail Enforce.

After you add the DKIM key in Valimail, inform Wordfly so they can help run verification tests to confirm the DKIM is passing.

You can also find the instructions on how to set up DKIM and SPF for Wordfly, **[here](https://support.wordfly.com/hc/en-us/articles/204767474-DKIM-email-authentication)
**.

Add a Wordfly DKIM key in Valimail
==================================

You can find more detailed information on how to add a DKIM key in Valimail, here:

[Add a DKIM key in Valimail](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8466384-adding-a-dkim-key-in-enforce-align)

Configuring SPF authentication for your Wordfly emails
======================================================

Once you establish that Wordfly is an authorized sender for your domain, you will need to add the service in your Enabled Senders.

You will find more detailed information on how to add a service for your domain in Valimail, here:

[Enabling a sender for SPF in Valimail](https://support.valimail.com/en/articles/8733052-how-to-enable-a-sender-for-spf-in-enforce-align)

**_Note_**: We encourage you to use the comment section for any useful information about your sending service, such as the name of the service owner, change request ticket numbers, etc.
